title: carex panicea subsp. pelia
intro: Carex panicea subsp. pelia, also known as the hair sedge, is a perennial sedge plant that belongs to the genus Carex. It is native to Europe and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids in its leaves. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Carex panicea subsp. pelia can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken orally to reap its health benefits.
